name: RebarThreadingDataNullable
summary: The RebarThreadingDataNullable class defines the threading properties at the end of a reinforcing bar affected by a RebarEndDetailModifier. If a threading property is null then that property will not be applied to the RebarSet generated reinforcing bars.

constructors.name: RebarThreadingDataNullable
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RebarThreadingDataNullable class.

properties.name: ExtraFabricationLength
properties.summary: Gets or sets the extra fabrication length.

properties.name: Length
properties.summary: Gets or sets the threading length.

properties.name: ThreadingType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the threading type. Null indicates that the threading type is not specified.
